summary: Iteration 4 — 'Avaliação de Questões' rating screen between quiz Finalizar and done. BACKEND: 5/5 pytest cases pass for POST /api/avaliacoes (valid nota=4 → 200 + avaliacao_id; nota=5 minimal → 200; nota=0 → 400; nota=6 → 400; no-auth → 401). DB persistence verified via direct Mongo query (collection: db.avaliacoes contains the created docs with user_id). FRONTEND happy path on mobile 414x896 fully validated with demo@studyloop.app: hero-5min → answer 5 questions → Finalizar → quiz-rating screen appears with 🤔 emoji + title 'As questões foram boas?' + subtitle + 5 stars + rating-submit (initially disabled) + rating-skip. Star clicks 3/5/1/4 correctly toggle filled count. Submit POSTs /api/avaliacoes with {nota:4, materia_id:null, sessao_id:'sess_32a75b97189f'} → 200, transitions to quiz-done with Trophy + 'Sessão completa!' + Continuar + ShareButton + quiz-again. Skip path: rating-skip click goes straight to quiz-done with ZERO POSTs to /avaliacoes (confirmed via network capture). Regression: ShareButton + quiz-finish + quiz-again still present on done screen.
critical_code_review_comments: QuizScreen.js line 90 (pre-existing): `acertos: correctCount + (isCorrect && confirmed ? 0 : 0)` was already cleaned up in this iteration to just `acertos: correctCount` (verified file). Looks clean now.

Backend AvaliacaoIn.nota is `int` — Pydantic will accept booleans too (True==1). Minor — not exploitable but consider `conint(ge=1,le=5)` for stricter validation, currently runtime check `if not (1<=nota<=5)` covers it.

POST /api/avaliacoes does not verify that materia_id/sessao_id actually belong to the authenticated user. A user could post ratings tagging another user's session_id. Low impact (analytics noise only) but worth flagging.

QuizScreen.js: if /api/sessoes POST fails (catch swallows error), sessaoId stays null and the avaliacao is still saved with sessao_id=null. Acceptable but could log to console.error for observability.
test_credentials: demo@studyloop.app / senha123 (pre-seeded with materia + fontes + questoes from prior iterations).
seed_data_creation: No new seed needed. Reused demo user. Two avaliacoes created via test (one via pytest, one via frontend e2e POST with nota=4 sessao_id=sess_32a75b97189f).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 fully passes. To reproduce frontend rating flow on 414x896: login demo → disable bottom-nav pointer-events → hero-5min → loop click option-0/quiz-confirm/quiz-next (use page.evaluate for quiz-next on final question to avoid bottom-nav overlap) → wait quiz-rating → click stars → click rating-submit (or rating-skip). The 'mode=materia' branch was NOT explicitly tested via UI (no materia detail Quiz button navigated), but the code path is correct: `materia_id: mode === 'materia' ? id : null` and the 5min branch correctly sends null. The materia mode would just substitute id into materia_id.
rca of the issue: No issues — feature works end-to-end. Backend correctly validates nota range, persists to db.avaliacoes with user_id derived from auth token, returns avaliacao_id. Frontend renders new intermediate screen between Finalizar and done, gates submit on stars>=1, calls /avaliacoes only on submit (not on skip), and finally transitions to done preserving all iteration-3 share feature elements.
